title: Vertex Types
subtitle: Manage VertexLabel definitions, properties, indexes and data
empty: No vertex types. Click "Add Vertex Type" at the top right.
identifierHint: Will auto-create a STRING property and mark it as the business primary key
propListReadonly: — Read-only. Add/edit/delete properties in Property Management
noPropsOnLabel: No properties on this vertex type

detail.noTable: Table does not exist or has no columns

msg.stringIdRequired: String ID requires a field name
msg.confirmClear:
Clear {{count}} vertices of "{{schema}}.{{label}}"?

⚠️ Only deletes vertex data, keeps table V_{{table}} and VertexLabel definition.
msg.confirmClearEmpty:
Clear "{{schema}}.{{label}}"?
(no vertex data currently)

⚠️ Only deletes vertex data, keeps table structure.
msg.confirmDelete:
Delete vertex type "{{schema}}.{{label}}"?

🔴 This will permanently delete:
   • VertexLabel definition
   • Physical table {{table}}
   • All vertex data in this table

This cannot be undone!
msg.deleted: Deleted vertex type and underlying table
